summary: NeatMS is an open source python package for untargeted LCMS signal labelling and filtering.
The matrix size argument represents the number of points used to represent a peak.
The margin argument represents the size of the surrounding signal that should be kept on the retention time dimension.
A margin of 1 means that the margin size on both sides of the peak will be the same size as the peak width.
For a peak with a retention time width of 3 seconds and margin of 1, the extracted signal will be 9 seconds.
With default argument values, the first and last 40 values of the peak represent the margins, and the middle 40 values represent the peak itself.
A second dimension is added to represent the margin portion of the signal (0) or the peak signal (1).
The resulting matrix size for one peak is (2, 120) with default arguments.
